name: Spicy Italian Prune-Plum Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Pitted and quartered Italian prune-plums, cooked until soft and cooled
1 cup Sifted flour (including 1 tsp Cinnamon, 1/2 tsp Ground cloves, 1/2 tsp Ground nutmeg)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the prune-plums and set aside. Butter and flour a 10-inch Bundt pan.
2. In a large bowl, cream butter and sugar together until light and fluffy. Beat in eggs one at a time and continue to beat until mixture is very light.
3. Sift flour with spices and baking soda. Add the flour mixture to the butter mixture in thirds, alternating with milk. Beat only to incorporate the ingredients.
4. Stir in cooked prune-plums and walnuts. Pour into prepared pan and bake in a preheated 350-degree oven for 1 hour, or until cake begins to shrink from the sides of the pan. Let cool in the pan for 5 minutes before unmolding onto a rack. Let cool completely before frosting.
5. To prepare the frosting: Cream butter. Gradually add powdered sugar and cocoa, stirring until well blended. Add salt.
6. Stir in coffee, a little at a time, until it reaches a good spreading consistency. Beat until fluffy, then add vanilla and frost cake.
